summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Facette E-Commerce Platform with facette.com.tr style UI. All major features working correctly including header layout, hero slider, search, category filtering, product detail with size chart popup, and add to cart flow.
critical_code_review_comments: useEffect dependency warnings in multiple components (Header, AuthContext, Category, ProductDetail, Search, StaticPage, admin/Orders, admin/Products) - not critical but should be addressed for code quality
seed_data_creation: 246 products already imported from facette.com.tr XML
context_for_next_testing_agent: All facette.com.tr style UI features tested and working. Header with menu left/logo center/icons right, hero slider with facette images, 3-column category banners, product cards with bookmark and image dots, search popup with popular searches and live results, category page with filter sidebar and grid options (2,3,4 columns), product detail with thumbnail gallery and size chart popup (last image), add to cart flow with cart drawer.

features_tested.header_layout: PASS - Menu (EN YENİLER, GİYİM, AKSESUAR, SALE) on left, FACETTE logo center, icons (search, account, cart) on right
features_tested.hero_slider: PASS - Full width slider with facette.com.tr images, prev/next navigation working
features_tested.product_cards: PASS - Bookmark icon, image dots (4 dots visible), quick add button, FACETTE brand label, price display
features_tested.search_popup: PASS - Opens on search icon click, shows 'EN ÇOK ARANANLAR' with popular search buttons
features_tested.live_search: PASS - Typing shows live results (6 products for 'elbise'), product images and prices displayed
features_tested.category_page: PASS - Filter button, product count, grid options (2,3,4 columns) all working
features_tested.filter_sidebar: PASS - Opens with sorting options, category list, price range inputs, 'FİLTRELERİ TEMİZLE' button
features_tested.product_detail_thumbnails: PASS - 5 thumbnail images on left side, clicking changes main image
features_tested.size_chart_popup: PASS - 'Beden Tablosu' link opens modal with last product image as size chart
features_tested.size_selection: PASS - XS, S, M, L, XL buttons, selected size highlighted
features_tested.quantity_controls: PASS - Minus/plus buttons for quantity adjustment
features_tested.add_to_cart: PASS - 'SEPETE EKLE' button adds product, shows toast 'Ürün sepete eklendi', cart badge updates
features_tested.cart_drawer: PASS - Shows product with image, name, size, price, quantity controls, total, 'SEPETE GİT' and 'ÖDEMEYE GEÇ' buttons
features_tested.mobile_menu: PASS - Hamburger menu opens sidebar with EN YENİLER, GİYİM, AKSESUAR, SALE (red), Hesabım
